title: The Age of The Sovereignpreneur Has Begun
summary: Jordan Urbs argues that AI and Bitcoin together enable a new class of independent operators called "sovereignpreneurs" who maintain autonomy over money, production, and their time. The thesis combines sovereign individual ideology with solo entrepreneurship, positioning Bitcoin for monetary sovereignty and AI for labor leverage as complementary tools.
